sentences.target: Je participe au tournoi ce week-end.

translations.fr: Je participe au tournoi ce week-end.
translations.en: I'm taking part in the tournament this weekend.
translations.es: Este fin de semana participo en el torneo.
translations.de: Ich nehme dieses Wochenende am Turnier teil.
translations.it: Partecipo al torneo questo fine settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个周末我参加锦标赛。
translations.yue: 呢個週末我會參加比賽。
translations.ru: Я участвую в турнире в эти выходные.
translations.pt: Vou participar no torneio neste fim de semana.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này tôi tham gia giải đấu.
translations.ar: سأشارك في البطولة في عطلة نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Dit weekend doe ik mee aan het toernooi.
translations.uk: Я беру участь у турнірі цих вихідних.
translations.hu: Ezen a hétvégén részt veszek a tornán.
translations.hi: मैं इस सप्ताहांत टूर्नामेंट में हिस्सा ले रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: W ten weekend biorę udział w turnieju.
translations.el: Αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο συμμετέχω στο τουρνουά.
translations.nb: Jeg deltar i turneringen denne helgen.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini saya ikut turnamen.
translations.sv: I helgen deltar jag i turneringen.
translations.da: I weekenden deltager jeg i turneringen.
translations.ja: 今週末は大会に参加します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 1st person singular; agrees with 'Je'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le' (masc. sg.); introduces the PP complement of 'participer'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' in the PP 'au tournoi'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'week-end' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine; part of the temporal NP 'ce week-end' functioning as an adverbial time adjunct.

translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn có thể tham gia.
translations.hi: तुम आज भाग ले सकते हो.
translations.sv: Du kan vara med i dag.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; expresses ability and selects the infinitive 'participer'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement (xcomp) of the modal 'peux' with subject control by 'Tu'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the whole clause to indicate time.

sentences.target: Ils participent à la réunion de demain.
sentences.reading: /il paʁ.ti.sip a la ʁe.jy.njɔ̃ də də.mɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils participent à la réunion de demain.
translations.ipa: /il paʁ.ti.sip a la ʁe.jy.njɔ̃ də də.mɛ̃/
translations.en: They're taking part in tomorrow's meeting.
translations.es: Participan en la reunión de mañana.
translations.de: Sie nehmen morgen an der Besprechung teil.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们会参加明天的会议。
translations.yue: 佢哋會參加聽日嘅會議。
translations.pt: Eles vão participar da reunião de amanhã.
translations.vi: Họ sẽ tham gia cuộc họp vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ze nemen morgen deel aan de vergadering.
translations.uk: Вони беруть участь у завтрашній нараді.
translations.hi: वे कल की बैठक में भाग लेंगे.
translations.pl: Oni biorą udział w jutrzejszym spotkaniu.
translations.nb: De deltar på møtet i morgen.
translations.sv: De deltar i mötet i morgon.
translations.ro: Ei participă la ședința de mâine.
translations.da: De deltager i mødet i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼らは明日の会議に参加します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ils'.
Preposition introducing the PP complement of 'participent'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'réunion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.
Preposition introducing a temporal modifier 'de demain' that specifies the meeting.
Temporal adverb used as a complement to 'de' to modify 'réunion' (post-nominal temporal specification).

sentences.target: Nous participons au match ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous participons au match ce soir.
translations.en: We're taking part in the game tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche participamos en el partido.
translations.de: Wir nehmen heute Abend am Spiel teil.
translations.ru: Мы участвуем в матче сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite participamos do jogo.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi tham gia trận đấu.
translations.nl: Vanavond doen we mee aan de wedstrijd.
translations.uk: Ми беремо участь у матчі сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este részt veszünk a meccsen.
translations.hi: हम आज रात मैच में हिस्सा ले रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem bierzemy udział w meczu.
translations.nb: I kveld deltar vi i kampen.
translations.sv: I kväll deltar vi i matchen.
translations.ro: În seara asta participăm la meci.
translations.da: I aften deltager vi i kampen.
translations.ja: 今夜は試合に参加します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 1st person plural; agrees with 'Nous'.
Contraction of 'à' (preposition) and 'le' (definite article, masc. sg.); introduces PP complement 'au match'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine; in the NP 'ce soir' used adverbially to indicate time.
